Not ARGUED. Not reported. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleading is OFF CALENDAR, moot. The matter addressed on the merits on Plaintiff's Motion for Judgment on the Petition. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not Reported (D501)

Plaintiff'S Motion For Judgment On The Petition For Writ Of Mandate

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher E. Skinnell, (415) 389-6800 ext. 6872 for Plaintiff, San Francisco Apartment
Assn. via CourtCall
Jeremy M. Goldman, (415) 554-6762, for Defendant, City And County Of San
Francisco, via CourtCall.
Raquel Sharp, CSR#10619, (925)384-0003, Transcript Legal, email:raquel@transcriptlegal.com, Court Reporter. via CourtCall

Hearing is held and ARGUED. The Court addresses the following with counsel: Premeptive issue, Costa Hawkings, raising of rent, Local Government Requlations and bad faith. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes)

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff'S Motion For Judgment On The Petition For Writ Of Mandate is DENIED. Order is signed in open court. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR#10619, email:raquel@transcriptlegal.com
